creator: fender0107401@gmail.com
text:
I am sorry.

I reported this problem a few minutes ago, but I did not give a perfect solution.

In our handbook: 7.5.3. KMyMoney

Here is the original sentence:
KMyMoney is a personal finance created by the KDE community.

I think the better one should be:
KMyMoney is a personal financial tool created by the KDE community.

============================================================

In other words, I think we should add tool and also change finance to financial.
